ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Customer unable to set up autopay online due to system error. Agent manually enables autopay effective next billing cycle.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: I need to set up autopay but your website won't let me.
Agent: Let me help you with that. Are you getting an error message?
Customer: It says 'invalid payment method' but my card works everywhere else.
Agent: It might be a system issue. I can set up autopay on my end for you.
Customer: That would be great.
Agent: Done. Autopay is now active starting next month.
